events.eventInfo:
Join us for the ultimate fall trail series. Technical single-track, beautiful lake views, and the best post-race community in Stillwater. All proceeds benefit the Lake McMurtry Trail System!

Location: East Side Pavilion, Lake McMurtry
Start Times: Marathon 7:00 AM | Half 7:30 AM | 10K 8:00 AM | 5K 8:30 AM

accordions.title: Registration Pricing
accordions.content:
DistanceFee
Marathon$70
Half Marathon$60
10K$50
5K$40

accordions.title: Course Maps & Trail Colors
accordions.content:
All races are out and backs starting at the East Side pavilion (Red Trail Head).

  • 5K & 10K: Yellow Trail
  • Half Marathon: Yellow & Red Trails
  • Marathon: Yellow, Red, Green, and Blue Trails

accordions.title: Packet Pickup & Camping
accordions.content:
Packet Pickup: Friday from 5-8 PM at Stonecloud Brewing in Stillwater (917 S Husband). Race day pickup begins at 5:30 AM.

Accommodations: Primitive camping is available by the East Side Pavilion on Friday night. Bathrooms are available, but no showers.

accordions.title: Awards & Swag
accordions.content:
All participants will receive a cool Finisher's Medal! Pre-registered runners receive a short sleeve t-shirt.

Awards to the top three finishers in Female, Non-Binary, and Male categories following each race.

events.eventInfo:
Big news: Stillwater Trail and Road Runners is taking the reins of the Lake McMurtry Trail Run — the oldest trail race in Oklahoma.

The race returns in April 2027 on the rolling single-track and shaded canopies of Lake McMurtry's east side trails. Full race details, distances, and registration are coming soon — watch this page and our Facebook group for announcements.
